flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at SUNY Buffalo State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.4k vs 6.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY Buffalo State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0k → 5.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY Buffalo State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (26.9% → 22.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Buffalo State University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $6.0k).
